# Merag Nokhiz — Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect & Engineer

> Senior Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect and Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing and building scalable, resilient infrastructure across AWS, Azure, GCP, and on-premise environments. Focus areas: Landing Zone, Data Mesh, Internal Developer Platform (IDP), GenAI/LLMOps, MLOps, FinOps, SRE, and Zero-Trust Security.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://nokhiz.github.io/)
- [Projects](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects)
- [Blog / Thoughts](https://nokhiz.github.io/blog)
- [Services](https://nokhiz.github.io/services)
- [Contact](https://nokhiz.github.io/contact)

## About Merag Nokhiz

Merag Nokhiz is a Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect and Engineer based in Germany. He designs developer-centric platforms that reduce operational friction while enforcing security and compliance requirements. His work spans full cloud migrations (Lift & Shift, Re-platform, Re-architect), internal developer platforms, ML infrastructure, and enterprise-scale cost optimization.

**Key expertise:**
- Cloud Architecture: AWS, Azure, GCP, hybrid and on-premise
- Landing Zones and multi-account governance
- Platform Engineering: Internal Developer Platforms with Backstage, golden paths, self-service infrastructure
- MLOps & LLMOps: end-to-end ML lifecycle, feature stores, model serving, scalable inference
- GenAI Infrastructure: agentic systems, RAG pipelines, LLM deployment
- FinOps: 20–50% cloud cost reduction via Reserved Instances, Spot strategies, governance frameworks
- SRE: SLOs, error budgets, GitOps-driven automation
- Security & Compliance: Zero-Trust, IAM hardening, GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Pulumi, Ansible
- Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD

**Contact:**
- Email: merag.nokhiz@outlook.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/meragnokhiz
- GitHub: https://github.com/nokhiz
- Calendar: https://cal.com/nokhiz/meeting

## Selected Projects

Enterprise infrastructure and platform engineering projects across automotive, medtech, and optics industries.

- [Enterprise Internal Development Platform (IDP) on Azure](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bbraun_idp) — Design and development of an Internal Development Platform (IDP) on Azure to empower teams with standardized, secure, and automated cloud-native application environments.
- [MedTech IoT Platform on Azure](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bbraun_iot_medtech) — Re-architected and migrated B. Braun’s MedTech IoT proof-of-concept into a scalable, secure, and production-grade Azure cloud platform for device data ingestion, analytics, and visualization.
- [Enterprise Azure Landing Zone Platform on Azure](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bbraun_landingzone) — Design, development, and operations of a secure and scalable Azure Landing Zone for enterprise-wide cloud enablement at B. Braun.
- [MLOps Inference MediTech Platform on Azure](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/zeiss_mlops_inf_platf) — Designed and developed a secure, compliant, and scalable MLOPS inference platform on Microsoft Azure to enable AI-powered decision support and intelligent medical applications at ZEISS Meditec.
- [AI Kubernetes GPU On-Premises Cluster](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/zeiss_onpremise_hpc_cluster) — Deployed and operated an on-premises GPU Kubernetes cluster for AI model training at ZEISS Meditec, enabling high-performance, cost-efficient, and secure AI research and experimentation.
- [Delivery App, Cloud Architecture & DevOps Leadership on AWS](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bmw_delivery) — Led the cloud architecture and DevOps implementation for BMW’s Delivery App, a scalable AWS-based platform that optimized vehicle delivery operations and enhanced dealership efficiency.
- [eSignature Application on AWS](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bmw_esign) — Architected and implemented a scalable, secure, and compliant AWS cloud solution for BMW Group’s eSignature platform supporting digital contract signing in the Future Sales Model.
- [Emotional Virtual Experience (EVE) App on AWS](https://nokhiz.github.io/projects/bmw_eve) — Architected and led the development of BMW’s Emotional Virtual Experience (EVE) platform on AWS — a GPU-intensive cloud solution generating photorealistic vehicle images and videos using Unreal Engine.
